name: story-agent-vscode
description: Agentic story delivery — Aha integration, observation lounge wizard, and story lifecycle management inside VS Code

chatParticipants.name: story-agent
chatParticipants.description: Agentic story delivery — prepare Aha stories, track PRs, and manage the delivery lifecycle

commands.name: prepare
commands.description: Load an Aha story and generate an execution brief for human review (Observation Lounge)

commands.name: status
commands.description: Check current status of a tracked story

commands.name: dashboard
commands.description: Open the Story Agent web dashboard

storyAgent.ahaDomain.description: Aha domain (e.g. yourcompany.aha.io). Overridden by AHA_DOMAIN env var.

storyAgent.ahaApiKey.description: Aha API key. Overridden by AHA_API_KEY env var. Prefer storing in environment.

storyAgent.dashboardUrl.description: Base URL of the Story Agent Next.js dashboard.

enumDescriptions: Jira Cloud — requires JIRA_DOMAIN, JIRA_EMAIL, JIRA_API_TOKEN
Linear — requires LINEAR_API_KEY (stub — not yet implemented)
GitHub Projects v2 — requires GITHUB_TOKEN and GITHUB_ORG (stub)
Azure DevOps — requires AZURE_DEVOPS_ORG and AZURE_DEVOPS_TOKEN (stub)
storyAgent.agileProvider.description: Agile project management provider to use for story intake.
